data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Mandatory MFA for accessing critical systems to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Supports SMS, authenticator apps, and biometric options.

data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Uses AI-driven threat intelligence to detect and mitigate threats.
data.technical_spec: Integrated with Microsoft Defender and Sentinel.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Employs end-to-end encryption to protect data in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS for in-transit, Azure Storage Service Encryption for at-rest.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular internal and third-party audits to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Compliance with ISO 27001 and SOC 2 standards.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Prevents Distributed Denial of Service attacks with global network filtering.
